subcodes.first_line: No refuge is there for the servants from God's absolute decree and His precise command. 'Wherever ye are, death will find you out
subcodes.first_line_orig: لا مهرب للعباد من قضاء الله المبرم و امره المحکم اینما تکونوا یدرککم الموت
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @wisdom [hikmat], @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @consolation and comfort
